$comment: PA bills enriched with WTP-PA platform position matches. 'matchedPositions' is computed by pipeline/legislation/match_bills.py via keyword matching against data/legislation/platform.json. Manual alignment overrides live in data/legislation/manual_review.json. Refreshed by GitHub Actions cron.

bills.title: Midwifery Modernization in Pennsylvania
bills.summary: Modernizes Pennsylvania's regulatory framework for midwives, expanding access to midwifery services and updating professional standards.

bills.title: Increasing Student Success with More School Counselor Support
bills.summary: Increases funding for school counselors in Pennsylvania public schools to address student mental health and academic outcomes.

bills.title: Parental Notification of Bullying in Schools
bills.summary: Requires schools to notify parents when their child is involved in bullying incidents, either as a victim or perpetrator.

bills.title: Making Parking Fees Transparent for Renters
bills.summary: Requires landlords to disclose parking fees separately from rent in lease agreements to improve cost transparency for renters.

bills.title: Honor for Catholic War Veterans
bills.summary: Ceremonial resolution honoring the Catholic War Veterans organization for service to Pennsylvania veterans.

bills.title: Coming Home to Hunt
bills.summary: Allows Pennsylvania residents serving in the military to obtain hunting licenses at resident rates while stationed out of state.

bills.title: Aimee's Law — Establishing a Felony Animal Abuser Registry
bills.summary: Creates a public registry of individuals convicted of felony animal abuse, similar to existing sex offender registries.

bills.title: Community Standards for Data Center Developments
bills.summary: Establishes statewide community standards governing the siting, energy use, water consumption, and environmental impact of large data center developments.

bills.title: Congressional action on insider trading
bills.summary: Memorial resolution urging Congress to ban members of Congress and senior officials from trading individual stocks while in office.

bills.title: General appropriations bill (FY 2026-27)
bills.summary: Pennsylvania's annual general appropriations bill setting the FY 2026-27 operating budget for all state government functions.
